_description: Manual overrides on the auto-classifier in sentinel_coverage_map.py. A check whose NAME sounds behavioral (matches a verb-like signal token) may turn out to be enforced in a place Layer 2 cannot see - backend Python, edge function code, DB schema, etc. List those here with kind=structural and a one-line reason. The Playwright test stays in place (still documents intent), but the sentinel reports the rule as Layer-0-owned in the behavioral/structural split.
_format: Each entry is {validator, check, kind, reason}. Kind values: structural | behavioral. Default if absent: classifier auto.
_added: 2026-05-17 after the two-sweep audit (115/183 then 116/183 passing). The 39 entries below are checks the heuristic mislabeled as behavioral but Playwright cannot observe from the browser.

overrides.reason: Source-pattern: scans founder-console.html for isPlatformAdmin function declaration. Browser cannot introspect arbitrary source.
Source-pattern: scans for commented-out isPlatformAdmin. Comments are stripped before browser sees the page.
Source-pattern: looks for `await isPlatformAdmin()` in HTML source. Not always inline.
Source-pattern: looks for `// window.location` style commented redirects. Comments are stripped.
Source-pattern in floating-ai.js / chat code (external module).
Disclaimer string lives in external floating-ai.js module, not rendered HTML.
Conversation-type taxonomy is in ai-chain.ts edge fn, not browser-visible.
Compares calc_type registry between Python source and JS source; cross-file source-pattern check.
Monitors backend automation_log table; not surfaced in UI.
Tests wh-capture-validate.js logic; external module not in outerHTML.
Same - capture-validate logic lives in external module.
Token-budget rule on edge function source; not browser-observable.
Groq fallback chain is in _shared/ai-chain.ts edge fn; browser only sees the request outcome.
Null-guard pattern in edge fn source.
Machine-name normalization in Python analytics service.
Cross-file count check across Python + JS registries.
Realtime channel subscription pattern lives in inline script BUT depends on specific function names rarely in outerHTML.
RCM->pm_templates upsert is in edge function code, not browser-visible.
@media print rules in external stylesheet; not in outerHTML.
Registry-shape check: every CALC_TYPE needs a builder declared in the source.
Realtime channel INSERT+UPDATE config lives in edge fn / channel source.
hive_id query scoping pattern lives in many JS files; not all in outerHTML.
Cross-table DB invariant - belongs to Layer 0's relational integrity check.
DB column-existence check; pure schema concern.
Scans saveEditFromForm function body for canonical field set; source-pattern not browser-introspectable.
DB-level invariant: logbook.parts_used implies inventory_transactions row. Sentinel test runs the check but the rule is Layer 0 territory.
Min-sample-size guard lives in Python analytics; not in browser.
Outlier-cap logic in Python.
Risk-ranking logic in Python; UI shows results but the rule itself is backend.
TTL constant in Python; not surfaced by name in UI.
Exam questions array shape; data registry check.
Cleanup function pattern in external JS.
Registry-completeness across all disciplines and levels; source-shape check.
Checks for specific <script src=...> filename; cross-page registry rule.
Maturity gate function is defined in shared maturity.js; not always on the page.
Channel.filter() syntax lives in inline OR external scripts depending on page.
setHours(0,0,0,0) pattern in a date-utils helper, not always on the page directly.
DB-level constraint check; lives in Layer 0's domain.
Text-pattern check on source files - bans em-dash characters. Pure static scan.
Static-text check that canonical contact (admin@workhiveph.com) appears across files.
Static-text check banning legacy hello@ address from source.
Static-text check banning personal email leaks in source.
GA4 <script> block presence checked statically across HTML files; not UI-observable as a discrete rule.
GA4 measurement ID consistency across files; static-source check.
wh-ga4.js file presence and shape; filesystem + source check.
wh-ga4.js <script> tag presence across HTML files; static-source check.
llms.txt content check; static file.
llms.txt content check; static file.
llms.txt vs filesystem slugs; cross-file content check.
llms.txt required-sections content check; static file.
sitemap.xml content vs nav-hub.js registry; static cross-file check.
Resolves URLs in sitemap.xml against HTML filesystem; static check.
sitemap.xml metadata (lastmod/priority) shape; static check.

_path_b_fix_list: These are checks whose Playwright tests fail but the rule is genuinely UI-observable. Path B will tighten each test's selectors/assertions.
machine_validation_toast (logbook): empty machine submit should toast - needs to use real submit button + click
render_functions (analytics): page should render non-empty content host - timeout window or selector
period_consistency (analytics): period chips should be clickable - selector may need broadening
calculate_entry (analytics): page declares an analytics calc fn - check pattern may be too narrow
hint_quality (assistant): assistant exposes contextual hints - hint selector may be wrong
supervisor_gate_delete (inventory): supervisor sees delete control - depends on whether inventory rows are rendered for test user
discipline_icons (skillmatrix): each tile has an icon - selector for SVG/img inside tile needs work
